title: alopecurus × winklerianus
intro: Alopecurus × winklerianus, also known as Winkler's Foxtail, is a hybrid plant species within the Alopecurus genus, a type of grass. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Alopecurus × winklerianus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
